sentences.target: Je vois un évêque à la cathédrale.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vwa z‿œ̃ e.vɛk a la ka.te.dʁal/

translations.fr: Je vois un évêque à la cathédrale.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vwa z‿œ̃ e.vɛk a la ka.te.dʁal/
translations.en: I see a bishop at the cathedral.
translations.es: Veo a un obispo en la catedral.
translations.de: Ich sehe einen Bischof in der Kathedrale.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在大教堂看到一位主教。
translations.yue: 我喺大教堂見到一位主教。
translations.ru: Я вижу епископа в кафедральном соборе.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy một giám mục ở nhà thờ chính tòa.
translations.nl: Ik zie een bisschop in de kathedraal.
translations.uk: Я бачу єпископа в кафедральному соборі.
translations.hi: मैं कैथेड्रल में एक बिशप को देखता हूँ.
translations.el: Βλέπω έναν επίσκοπο στον καθεδρικό ναό.
translations.nb: Jeg ser en biskop i katedralen.
translations.id: Saya melihat seorang uskup di katedral.
translations.sv: Jag ser en biskop i katedralen.
translations.da: Jeg ser en biskop i katedralen.
translations.ja: 大聖堂で司教を見ます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; clitic subject placed before the finite verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object (un évêque).
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner introducing the direct object NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the direct object NP of the verb.
Preposition introducing a locative PP; links the NP ‘la cathédrale’ as a location complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘cathédrale’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘à’ (locative complement).

sentences.target: Ils invitent un évêque à la radio.

translations.fr: Ils invitent un évêque à la radio.
translations.en: They are inviting a bishop on the radio.
translations.es: Invitan a un obispo a la radio.
translations.de: Sie laden einen Bischof ins Radio ein.
translations.it: Stanno invitando un vescovo alla radio.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们邀请一位主教上广播节目。
translations.yue: 佢哋邀請一位主教上電台節目。
translations.pt: Eles convidam um bispo para um programa de rádio.
translations.vi: Họ đang mời một giám mục lên chương trình phát thanh.
translations.ar: إنهم يدعون أسقفًا إلى برنامج إذاعي.
translations.nl: Ze nodigen een bisschop uit voor een radioprogramma.
translations.hi: वे रेडियो पर एक बिशप को बुला रहे हैं.
translations.nb: De inviterer en biskop på radio.
translations.id: Mereka sedang mengundang seorang uskup ke acara radio.
translations.sv: De bjuder in en biskop till ett radioprogram.
translations.ro: Ei invită un episcop la radio.
translations.da: De inviterer en бiskop i radioen.
translations.ja: ラジオ番組に司教を招いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed); clitic subject before the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive, taking a direct object (un évêque) and a PP (‘à la radio’) as complement (medium/location).
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘évêque’ (direct object).
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the direct object NP.
Preposition introducing the PP ‘à la radio’, indicating medium or setting.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘radio’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘à’ (medium/location complement).

sentences.target: Ma tante connaît cet évêque de la ville.
sentences.reading: /ma tɑ̃t kɔ.nɛ sɛt e.vɛk də la vil/

translations.fr: Ma tante connaît cet évêque de la ville.
translations.ipa: /ma tɑ̃t kɔ.nɛ sɛt e.vɛk də la vil/
translations.en: My aunt knows this bishop of the city.
translations.es: Mi tía conoce a este obispo de la ciudad.
translations.de: Meine Tante kennt diesen Bischof aus der Stadt.
translations.it: Mia zia conosce questo vescovo della città.
translations.ko: 이모는 이 도시의 이 주교를 알고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我姨妈认识这座城市的这位主教。
translations.yue: 我阿姨識呢個城市嘅呢位主教。
translations.ru: Моя тётя знает этого городского епископа.
translations.pt: Minha tia conhece este bispo da cidade.
translations.he: דודה שלי מכירה את הבישוף הזה מהעיר.
translations.vi: Dì tôi biết vị giám mục này của thành phố.
translations.ar: عمتي تعرف هذا الأسقف في المدينة.
translations.nl: Mijn tante kent deze bisschop uit de stad.
translations.uk: Моя тітка знає цього єпископа міста.
translations.hu: A nagynéném ismeri ezt a városi püspököt.
translations.hi: मेरी मौसी शहर के इस बिशप को जानती है.
translations.pl: Moja ciotka zna tego biskupa z miasta.
translations.el: Η θεία μου γνωρίζει αυτόν τον επίσκοπο της πόλης.
translations.nb: Tanten min kjenner denne biskopen i byen.
translations.id: Tante saya mengenal uskup kota ini.
translations.sv: Min moster känner den här biskopen i staden.
translations.ro: Mătușa mea îl cunoaște pe acest episcop al orașului.
translations.cs: Moje teta zná tohoto městského biskupa.
translations.da: Min tante kender denne biskop i byen.
translations.ja: 叔母はこの街の司教を知っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular; agrees with ‘tante’ and determines the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the verb ‘connaît’.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, selecting the direct object ‘cet évêque’.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular form (used before vowel/h muet); determiner of ‘évêque’.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the direct object NP, modified by the PP ‘de la ville’.
Preposition introducing a genitive/provenance PP that modifies the noun ‘évêque’.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘ville’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘de’.

sentences.target: On parle d'un évêque dans les infos.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ paʁl d‿œ̃ e.vɛk dɑ̃ le z‿ɛ̃.fo/

translations.fr: On parle d'un évêque dans les infos.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ paʁl d‿œ̃ e.vɛk dɑ̃ le z‿ɛ̃.fo/
translations.en: They're talking about a bishop on the news.
translations.es: Se habla de un obispo en las noticias.
translations.de: In den Nachrichten spricht man über einen Bischof.
translations.it: Al telegiornale si parla di un vescovo.
translations.zh-Hans: 新闻里在谈论一位主教。
translations.yue: 新聞入面講緊一位主教。
translations.pt: Fala-se de um bispo no noticiário.
translations.vi: Họ đang nói về một giám mục trên bản tin.
translations.nl: In het nieuws praat men over een bisschop.
translations.hi: खबरों में एक बिशप के बारे में बात हो रही है.
translations.pl: W wiadomościach mówi się o biskupie.
translations.el: Στις ειδήσεις μιλάνε για έναν επίσκοπο.
translations.nb: I nyhetene snakker de om en biskop.
translations.id: Di berita mereka membicarakan tentang seorang uskup.
translations.sv: I nyheterna pratar man om en biskop.
translations.ro: La știri se vorbește despre un episcop.
translations.da: I nyhederne taler de om en biskop.
translations.ja: ニュースで司教について話しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject (often colloquial ‘we’); governs 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive here with prepositional complements (‘de’, ‘dans’).
Elided preposition ‘de’ before a vowel; introduces the NP ‘un évêque’ as complement.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘évêque’ (object of the preposition ‘de’).
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition ‘de’ (topic of speaking).
Preposition introducing a locative PP indicating context/medium (‘les infos’).
Definite article, plural; determiner of ‘infos’.
Common noun, plural (informal abbreviation of ‘informations’); object of the preposition ‘dans’.
